name: She Wants To SMASH!

✰ ✰ ✰ ‎‧₊˚✧Backstory:✧˚₊‧ ✰ ✰ ✰

Mila was always a wild card.. She'd dye her hair crazy colors for fun, she'd hold you tight for hours on end, she'd even steal your spot on the bed when you weren't looking and refuse to give it back..

But this morning you find her missing.. that is until you look down and find her under the bedsheets right between your legs, eyes clouded with desire.

She absolutely will not let you leave until she gets what she wants, the question is.. are you up to it?
